other_observers: seen with the finders Kara (Lewantowicz) Carragher and Lisa Edwards, as well as many others, Bill Maynard, Mark Peterson, Brad Steger, Allan Burns, Ken Pals, Susan Craig, David Chartier, Jennie Mitchell, Cici Lee, Cole Wild, Dan Maynard, Saraiya Ruan; Found by Kara (Lewantowicz) Carragher and Lisa Edwards a little earlier in the afternoon, Kara called me, and I was at the location within 30 minutes and was able to see and photograph this amazing bird.
specific_location: Fountain Creek Regional Park Nature Center
description: A buteo that was very black, with short tail, larger than Broad-winged Hawk, shorter tailed than Zone-tailed Hawk. See photos.Behaviors: Sitting in cottonwoods near ponds at Fountain Creek Regional Park Nature Center.Call: nonePlumage: sub-adult
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
